high_priority_threats.name: H5N1 in California Elephant Seals
high_priority_threats.description: First detection of H5N1 in US marine mammals - spillover from bird population

high_priority_threats.name: California Measles Outbreak
high_priority_threats.description: 17 cases, first outbreak since 2020, potential Disneyland exposure

high_priority_threats.name: Lassa Fever (US Importations)
high_priority_threats.description: 32+ imported cases globally, 1/3 fatality - designated top pandemic threat by WHO

lab_origin_assessments.description: Trump admin issued executive order banning federal funding for gain-of-function research in 'countries of concern'

web_search_findings.virus_outbreaks: Multiple outbreaks detected: Chikungunya (Seychelles), Measles (CA, FL), HMPV (Northern CA)
web_search_findings.avian_flu: Widespread: Elephant seals (CA), Skuas (Antarctica), Poultry (WI, IA, OK), Tamil Nadu India
web_search_findings.emerging_diseases: New bat-borne virus (PRV) in Bangladesh, Lassa fever warnings
web_search_findings.gain_of_function: Executive order restricting GoF research funding
